content.question: What is the age-specific dormitory and transport infrastructure capacity and welfare-supervision model required for 10-12 year-old boarders on 6-year tracks, versus the existing kollégium system designed for 14+ year-olds, and are current facilities adequate without retrofitting or additional support services?
content.reduction_path: Conduct a welfare audit of kollégium facilities housing early-track applicants, including supervision ratios, psychological support availability, and comparison with age-group developmental standards; survey current 6-year track boarders and their families on adequacy of accommodation and support.
